## Classes

<a id="viper-game2d-scenedocument"></a>
### `Viper.Game2D.SceneDocument`

Provides scene-owned editor document model.

Create `Viper.Game2D.SceneDocument` values through its registered constructor and use the
returned object with the instance members below. Its public surface exposes properties such as
`Width`, `Height`, `TileWidth` and operations including `LoadJson`, `LoadJsonResult`, `Load`,
`LoadResult`.

Constructor: `Viper.Game2D.SceneDocument.New`
